final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a Japanese schoolgirl in sailor uniform standing in front of a school building during cherry blossom season.

Style/medium: fresh Japanese aesthetic photography, soft editorial style reminiscent of Japanese youth magazines
Composition: medium shot at eye level, natural framing with the school building as backdrop, cherry blossom trees framing the scene
Subject: young Japanese schoolgirl in classic sailor uniform (seifuku), long hair gently lifted by breeze, serene expression, youthful energy
Scene/backdrop: Japanese school campus during sakura season, traditional school building facade, abundant pink cherry blossom trees in full bloom, petals falling
Lighting/mood: bright spring sunshine, soft diffused daylight, warm and uplifting atmosphere, gentle breeze effect
Color palette: soft pink cherry blossoms as dominant accent, warm skin tones, crisp white and navy blue of the uniform, fresh spring greens
Materials/textures: delicate falling cherry blossom petals, soft fabric of the uniform, natural hair strands in motion
Avoid: over-saturated colors, artificial filters, western school uniforms, winter or autumn mood, heavy makeup, posed studio look
